ham.subject: Ticket #9876: Fix for Authentication Bug Resolved
ham.body:
Hi Team,

I wanted to let you know that the authentication bug reported in Jira ticket #9876 has been fixed. I've pushed the changes to the develop branch on GitHub. Please pull the latest commit and run the integration tests.

You can view the diff here: <URL>

Once verified, feel free to merge into main.

Let me know if anything else is needed.

Thanks,
[Your Name]

spam.subject: Urgent: Payroll Correction Required – Immediate Action Needed
